decision_row: D-M19-3 CONTACT LAYER — latched_drawer closed landing by real contact
contact_map: === CONTACT MAP (①/②/③ doctrine) — collision enabled ONLY for class-② limit carriers ===
② panel×face_frame           COLLIDE  — CLOSED landing = the front-panel-on-face-frame hard stop (s=0) (verified by real contact)
② tray×rail                  (dof)    — realized by the declared joint + fit clearance (no LIMIT to carry)
